steps.title: Track the passage structure
steps.content: The text opens by asking what a city is, then says the answer varies by country. The examples of Albania, Greece, and building-count definitions explain why the same question has multiple answers.

steps.title: Reject unsupported structures
steps.content: A is about city counts, C invents two locations with only one city, and D invents a recommendation. The structure is a question followed by an explanation of varied answers. The answer is B.
